args.code: (() => { const se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement; const sel = (s) => document.querySelectorAll(s).length; const scrollables = []; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el => { const cs = getComputedStyle(el); if ((cs.overflowY === 'auto' || cs.overflowY === 'scroll') && el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight + 50) { scrollables.push({ cls: (el.className||'').toString().slice(0,60), sh: el.scrollHeight, ch: el.clientHeight }); } }); return JSON.stringify({ url: location.href, innerH: window.innerHeight, docScrollTop: se.scrollTop, docScrollH: se.scrollHeight, docClientH: se.clientHeight, counts: { activityUrn: sel('[data-urn*="urn:li:activity"]'), feedUpdate: sel('.feed-shared-update-v2'), reusableResult: sel('.reusable-search__result-container'), searchResultLi: sel('div.search-results-container li'), updateComponents: sel('[data-view-name="feed-full-update"]') }, scrollables: scrollables.slice(0,8) }); })()
